name: 22q13_Phelan_McDermid_SHANK3
description: 22q13.33 subtelomeric region (Phelan-McDermid syndrome). Variable-size terminal deletions remove SHANK3 and other genes. Subtelomeric SDs and the 22q telomere make breakpoint mapping difficult; not strictly recurrent (most are terminal), but the SD architecture distally is complex.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD-rich region; SHANK3 lies ~70 kb from the telomere; non-recurrent deletions range from <100 kb to >9 Mb; ring chromosome 22 also produces the phenotype.
